basic_details.job_title: Central University of Gujarat Project Associate Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.short_information: Central University of Gujarat Recruitment 2026: Central University of Gujarat has released the official notification for 1 Project Associate posts, inviting applications from eligible candidates. This recruitment provides an excellent opportunity for candidates seeking research jobs.

application_fee.details: No application fee is mentioned in the official notification.

age_limit.details: Upper age limit is 35 years as on the last date of application. Relaxation applicable as per Government of India rules for SC/ST/OBC/PwBD candidates.

qualification.education_qualification: M.Sc. in Chemistry/Chemical Sciences/Industrial Chemistry/Material Sciences/NanoSciences/Pharmaceutical Chemistry/Computational Science/Materials Science/Bioscience with minimum 55% marks.
qualification.details: Project Associate: M.Sc. in Chemistry/Chemical Sciences/Industrial Chemistry/Material Sciences/NanoSciences/Pharmaceutical Chemistry/Computational Science/Materials Science/Bioscience from a recognized university or institute, with minimum 55% marks. Prior experience in laboratory research, nanomaterials, or environmental chemistry is desirable.

selection_process: Shortlisting based on qualification and suitability Interview
how_to_apply: Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Prepare your application with complete bio-data including personal details, educational qualifications, and experience.
Attach self-attested copies of all required documents such as educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs.
Clearly mention the post applied for in the subject line of the email.
Send the complete application to the official email address mentioned in the notification.
Ensure the email is sent before the last date: 09-08-2026.
Keep a copy of the sent email for future reference.

content_sections.heading: Central University of Gujarat Project Associate Vacancy 2026 Notification PDF
content_sections.text: Candidates who are interested in applying for the Central University of Gujarat Recruitment 2026 should first download and carefully read the official notification PDF. The notification contains complete details about vacancy distribution, eligibility criteria, age limit, stipend/salary, selection process, important dates, and application instructions. Reading the official document is important to ensure that you meet all requirements before submitting the application form. Download Central University of Gujarat Project Associate Job 2026 Notification PDF

Central University of Gujarat Project Associate Eligibility Criteria 2026
content_sections.text: Project Associate: M.Sc. in Chemistry/Chemical Sciences/Industrial Chemistry/Material Sciences/NanoSciences/Pharmaceutical Chemistry/Computational Science/Materials Science/Bioscience from a recognized university or institute, with minimum 55% marks. Prior experience in laboratory research, nanomaterials, or environmental chemistry is desirable.

content_sections.heading: Central University of Gujarat Project Associate Application Fee 2026
content_sections.text: No application fee is mentioned in the official notification.

content_sections.heading: Central University of Gujarat Project Associate Age Limit 2026
content_sections.text: Upper age limit is 35 years as on the last date of application. Relaxation applicable as per Government of India rules for SC/ST/OBC/PwBD candidates.

content_sections.heading: How to Apply
content_sections.text: Read the official notification carefully before applying. Prepare your application with complete bio-data including personal details, educational qualifications, and experience. Attach self-attested copies of all required documents such as educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs. Clearly mention the post applied for in the subject line of the email. Send the complete application to the official email address mentioned in the notification. Ensure the email is sent before the last date: 09-08-2026. Keep a copy of the sent email for future reference.

content_sections.heading: Central University of Gujarat Project Associate Recruitment 2026 - Important Links

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the Project Associate position at Central University of Gujarat?
faq.answer: The last date to submit your email application for the Project Associate position is 09 August 2026. Ensure your application reaches the designated email address before this deadline.

faq.question: Q2. What is the educational qualification required for the Project Associate role?
faq.answer: Candidates must possess an M.Sc. degree in Chemistry, Chemical Sciences, Industrial Chemistry, Material Sciences, NanoSciences, Pharmaceutical Chemistry, Computational Science, Materials Science, or Bioscience with a minimum of 55% marks from a recognized university or institute.

faq.question: Q3. Is there any age relaxation for reserved categories?
faq.answer: Yes, age relaxation is applicable for SC/ST/OBC/PwBD candidates as per the Government of India rules. The upper age limit is 35 years as of the last application date.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary offered for the Project Associate position?
faq.answer: The selected candidate will receive a consolidated salary of Rs. 37,000 per month, which includes House Rent Allowance (HRA).

faq.question: Q5. How will candidates be selected for the Project Associate position?
faq.answer: The selection process involves shortlisting candidates based on their qualifications and suitability, followed by an interview. Only shortlisted candidates will be called for the interview.

faq.question: Q6. What is the application mode for this recruitment?
faq.answer: Applications are to be submitted via email. Candidates need to send their CV and supporting documents to the specified email address.

faq.question: Q7. Is prior research experience mandatory for the Project Associate role?
faq.answer: Prior experience in laboratory research, nanomaterials, or environmental chemistry is desirable but not mandatory. It can enhance your application's suitability.

faq.question: Q8. Where is the Central University of Gujarat located?
faq.answer: The Central University of Gujarat is located in Vadodara, Gujarat, with the pincode 391107.

faq.question: Q9. How many vacancies are available for the Project Associate post?
faq.answer: There is one vacancy available for the Project Associate position in this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q10. What documents should be attached with the application?
faq.answer: Candidates should attach self-attested copies of all required documents, including educational certificates, mark sheets, experience certificates (if any), and proof of age.
